topic: flame ag_linear bf16 precision tier (consumer-side wiring)
topology: 2-layer Linear chain forward (B=128, D=128, H=256, C=64)

builds_on.N51 0b3be802: Metal matmul_bf16 codegen-emit silicon-fired (Apple M3, 1015 GFLOPS @ 768³, bit-exact FP32 accum)

modes.note: byte-equal with N40/N58 e2e prior measurement

bf16 envelope holds — chained 2-layer K=128→K=256 random-walk accumulates ~0.5*ulp_bf16 per MAC; observed 2.4 parts per 1000 normalised to global y magnitude; within bf16's ~3 decimal digit envelope (1e-3) at one order of safety

compiled_hexa_link.blocker: codegen_c2.hexa does not yet wire `farr32_*` family as a named builtin (only farr_*, farr_to_bf16, farr_from_bf16)
compiled_hexa_link.consequence: host_check.hexa parses cleanly but does not link as a compiled binary; C-mirror host_check.c is the production-equivalent validation surface
compiled_hexa_link.history: same blocker hit N40/N53 (see rfc075_flame_ag_linear_e2e_metal_2026_05_21/RESULT.md scope carve-out)
compiled_hexa_link.scope_constraint: @F f2 forbids C-transpile codegen changes this cycle

hir_to_mir_synthesis_path.current: consumer helper _ag_linear_metal_bf16_fwd uses RFC 035 farr_to_bf16 storage round-trip (FP64 arena, bf16-bit-exact values, FP32 SGEMM accumulator)
hir_to_mir_synthesis_path.deferred: N68 _op_with_precision HIR→MIR synthesis applies when source-level bf16 type tags flow through ag_tape; deeper than this cycle's consumer wiring scope
hir_to_mir_synthesis_path.follow_up: future cycle adds source-level bf16 type annotations through ag_tape; the same HEXA_BF16=1 gate flips to the synthesis path with no caller change

bwd_helper.scope: this cycle is forward-only (consumer wiring N40 → bf16 fwd analogue); the bwd helper _ag_linear_metal_bf16_bwd is symmetric and deferred to a follow-up to keep this cycle's surface narrow per @D g3

build.command: xcrun --sdk macosx clang -O2 -DHEXA_METAL -fobjc-arc -framework Metal -framework MetalPerformanceShaders -framework Foundation inbox/fires/rfc075_flame_ag_linear_bf16_2026_05_21/host_check.c self/metal/runtime_metal.m -o /tmp/flame_bf16_test

files: host_check.hexa  — hexa-source autograd harness (parse-clean, link-blocked on codegen builtin map)
host_check.c    — C harness (production-equivalent path; exercises bf16 round + FP32 SGEMM + Metal MPS shim)
fire.log         — captured stdout/stderr of all 3 env modes
